title: thymus loevyanus var. serpens
intro: Thymus loevyanus var. serpens, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The medicinal properties of Thymus loevyanus var. serpens include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of creeping thyme can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
